items.name: brca-drug-response-ai
items.description: Explainable AI framework for precision drug response prediction in breast cancer using TCGA BRCA and GDSC datasets. Integrates machine learning, pharmacogenomics, and interpretable AI to predict personalized therapeutic responses and rank candidate drugs computationally.

items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: MissaouiYassine1
items.description: Computer Engineering student working on machine learning systems, web, and mobile applications. I build end-to-end solutions from data processing and modeling to API deployment, using Python, SQL, FastAPI, Docker, and modern web/mobile frameworks, with a focus on practical, real-world projects.

items.name: Privacy-Preserving-Federated-Learning
items.description: A decentralized machine learning framework using PyTorch, IPFS, and Ethereum to enable secure, privacy-preserving AI model training.

items.name: Parkinsons-Multimodal-Analysis
items.description: An integrated analytical framework combining genetic, environmental, and lifestyle factors with machine learning classifiers and Structural Equation Modeling (SEM) to investigate heterogeneous symptom patterns in Parkinson's Disease.

items.description: Machine learning and graph neural network framework for materials property prediction using JARVIS-DFT, matminer, XGBoost, and PyTorch Geometric.

items.name: streamlit
items.description: Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.

items.name: scalable-inference-serving
items.description: A collection of APIs, frameworks, and platforms for scalable machine learning model inference serving, deployment, and management.

items.name: google-tensorflow
items.description: Google TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework providing APIs and tools for building, training, and deploying ML models, including TensorFlow Serving for model inference and TensorFlow Hub for reusable model components.

items.name: machine-learning-visual-framework
items.description: Visual framework and research exploration of major machine learning algorithms, their classifications, and real-world applications.

items.name: election_detection
items.description: Political stance detection framework for analyzing candidate affiliation during the 2024 U.S. presidential election using classical machine learning, neural embeddings, and transformer-based models on X (Twitter) data.

items.name: ML-algorithms-from-scratch
items.description: End to End implementation of the machine learning algorithms, built entirely from the ground up using python and numpy. This repository serves as a portfolio of technical excellence, showcasing the ability to develop, and debug complex mathematical models without reliance on high-level frameworks.

items.name: internrecom
items.description: A Confidence-Calibrated Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for Trust-Aware Internship Recommendation

items.name: Lung-Cancer-Detection-Pipeline
items.description: Machine Learning framework for early lung cancer risk prediction using clinical survey data with preprocessing, feature engineering, model evaluation, and comparative ML analysis.

items.name: Fraud_detection_with_stackelberg_game
items.description: We created a robust framework in UPI and banking fraud detection using adversarial game and machine learning

items.name: scikitlearn-journey
items.description: Building a strong foundation in machine learning framework scikit-learn and mastering core algorithms for problem solving.

items.name: Multi-vital-Monitoring-System-using-federated-ML
items.description: Federated Multivital Monitoring System > A privacy-preserving machine learning framework for real-time health monitoring. This system uses Federated Learning (Flower/Custom) to train models on vital sign data (ECG, Heart Rate, Arrhythmia) without ever moving sensitive patient data from local devices.

items.name: Donation-forecasting-research
items.description: This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods

items.name: Adversarial-Defense-Mechanisms
items.description: A comprehensive Python framework for implementing and evaluating adversarial defense mechanisms against machine learning attacks. This project provides modern implementations of various adversarial attacks and defense strategies with interactive visualization and experiment tracking.

items.name: Interpretable-Loan-Risk-Prediction
items.description: Machine Learning framework for loan default risk prediction using XGBoost, Random Forest, and SHAP explainability.

items.name: kmeans_nn_ILF_london_smart_meters
items.description: Kmeans-NN method for Individual Load Forecasting and online fault detection in smart meters, following the article: Tayseer, M., Talaat, M., Zamel, A.A. et al. "Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.

items.name: c3ping
items.description: c3ping is the web-based application integrated with Machine Learning for Course Recommendation built with Django Python Framework

items.name: NatureInspiredFeatureSelectionProject
items.description: This project investigates the impact of feature selection using the Dream Optimization Algorithm (DOA) on the performance of different machine learning classifiers. The study combines optimization theory, statistical learning, and mathematical modeling in a unified experimental framework.

items.name: Machine-Learning-for-Breast-Cancer
items.description: Hybrid-Fingerprint Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Inhibitors Relevant to Breast Cancer

items.name: RTL-Timing-Prediction-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-VLSI-Design-Automation
items.description: A machine learning framework to predict VLSI circuit delays from RTL metrics. Using 20 designs and ensemble techniques, it achieved 3.28% MAPE—far better than the 10% target. The system integrates multiple models, Bayesian optimization, SHAP explainability, delivers a production API with 12 ms latency and 90% confidence intervals.

items.name: Fuel-Efficiency-Predictor-Using-Django
items.description: Full-stack Fuel Efficiency Prediction System using React, Django REST Framework, JWT Authentication, and Machine Learning to predict vehicle MPG based on engine and vehicle specifications.

items.name: MML-DigitalArt-Learning
items.description: Multimodal Machine Learning framework for learning-performance modeling in digital art design education with reproducible synthetic multimodal dataset and MATLAB implementation.

items.name: Optimized-rooftop-photovoltaic-PV-design-parameters-to-reduce-net-energy-consumption
items.description: A case study integrating parametric modeling and machine learning to explore the design space and develop a surrogate model for prediction. The framework enables parameter importance ranking, and sensitivity analysis, uncertainty analysis, pareto front analysis, etc..

items.name: pypielm
items.description: A Unified Framework for Physics-Informed Extreme Learning Machines

items.name: WEATHER-FORECASTING-USING-MACHINE-LEARNING
items.description: Built a multivariate weather prediction framework using Machine Learning and Deep Learning algorithms such as Linear Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, and LSTM. Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and comparative analysis to determine the most accurate forecasting model.

items.name: New-Eyestrain_project
items.description: Machine learning framework for early risk analysis of digital eye strain using ocular stress indicators, blink dynamics, and eye movement analysis.

items.name: IPL-Auction-Analytics-Optimal-Bidding-System
items.description: This project is a complete sports analytics framework that transforms raw IPL ball-by-ball data into:  Player valuation models Auction bidding recommendations Tactical cricket insights Predictive performance forecasts  It combines cricket analytics, economics, machine learning concepts, and auction theory into one integrated decision-making system.

items.description: Repository for Final Year Project regarding Machine Learning Framework for Analog Circuit Design Optimsation

items.name: Phishing-Website-Detection-Using-Optimised-Machine-Learning-And-Deep-Learning
items.description: This project develops an enhanced phishing detection framework using a novel hybrid CNN + XGBoost architecture. It employs a Hybrid Ensemble Feature Selection (HEFS) methodology and compares tuned models such as Random Forest, XGBoost, CNN, and TCN via meta-learning layers to provide a robust solution for identifying malicious URLs.

items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for forecasting electricity demand using 7 advanced models across three paradigms: Statistical/Hybrid, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning.

items.name: credit-card-fraud-detection
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning framework designed to detect fraudulent credit card transactions. Implements advanced data preprocessing and handles extreme class imbalance (SMOTE) to identify anomalies and protect financial transactions with high precision and recall.

items.name: NGBoost-BridgeSeismicAssessment
items.description: A machine learning framework for seismic damage assessment of bridges using NGBoost. The project develops probabilistic models to predict bridge damage states under earthquake ground motions

items.name: healthcare-operations-risk-management
items.description: Machine learning pipeline for forecasting hospital staffed capacity risk using GBM + SVM ensemble with operational decision framework

items.name: AURORA
items.description: AURORA is a cloud data and machine learning project for forecasting national electricity demand for Great Britain.  This project explores a multitude of machine learning frameworks, and cloud infrastructure approaches to reach its final model predictions and workflow that is reproducible both locally and using AWS services on the cloud.

items.name: Machine-Learning-for-Portfolio-Optimisation
items.description: Machine Learning framework for portfolio optimisation, quantitative finance, asset allocation, risk management, and algorithmic trading using Python.

items.name: decentra
items.description: Decentra(Decision Central) is a Decision-Oriented Machine Learning framework for transforming predictive models into actionable decision systems.

items.name: Cover-Channel-through-DNS-Tunneling
items.description: the project implements a Machine Learning  (ML)-based detection framework that analyzes DNS traffic patterns in real-time. By ex- tracting key statistical features such as subdomain entropy, query frequency, and payload  length, the system employs anomaly detection algorithms to distinguish between benign  requests and malicious tunnels.

items.description: An ensemble machine learning framework (XGBoost, Random Forest, Monte Carlo) to predict F1 results using early-season data.

items.description: Machine learning equity alpha signal framework with ensemble models, LSTM walk-forward validation, and transaction-cost-aware backtesting.

items.description: Multimodal machine learning framework for early Parkinson’s Disease prediction using speech biomarkers and hand tremor features with ensemble learning and deep learning models.

items.description: This project develops a predictive maintenance framework for aircraft turbofan engines using NASA's C-MAPSS dataset. It combines machine learning (LightGBM) for Remaining Useful Life (RUL) prediction with discrete-event simulation (SimPy) to model the impact of maintenance queue delays on engine fleet health.

items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for cryptocurrency price prediction using advanced time series models and financial metrics evaluation.

items.description: TEMPO establishes a clinically grounded, mechanistic, and predictive modeling framework that integrates spatial single-cell data with systems biology and machine learning to advance precision oncology in TNBC.

items.description: DyNaMo‑RF is a fine‑tuned Random Forest machine learning framework developed to predict nanoparticle formation with FDA recognized dyes in drug-excipient nanoparticle systems.

items.name: portfolio
items.description: Engineering graduate passionate about full-stack development, AI applications, and problem-solving. Skilled in building responsive web applications, REST APIs, and AI-powered tools using modern technologies like Python, FastAPI, JavaScript, and machine learning frameworks.

items.description: This repository provides data and Python code for machine learning–based optimization of L-DOPA extraction from Vicia faba. It uses CART and ensemble models to identify high-yield conditions, offering an interpretable decision-support framework for scalable and industrial extraction processes.

items.description: Machine Learning assignments and experiments including data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, optimization, and explainability techniques using Python and deep learning frameworks.

items.description: A robust machine learning framework for plant leaf classification using nested cross-validation, feature extraction, and comparative model evaluation to ensure reliable and unbiased performance analysis.

items.description: Explainable Machine Learning framework for Docker image security assessment and pre-deployment protection in cloud environments.

items.name: waterseek
items.description: WaterSeek is a lightweight framework that uses large language models to extract structured data from electrochemical water treatment literature, enabling standardized databases, machine learning modeling, and interpretable analysis of degradation kinetics.

items.name: AI-Project
items.description: The project features a user-friendly web interface developed using the Django framework, allowing users to monitor, analyze, and manage potential threats seamlessly. By integrating machine learning with a webbased platform, This will enhances threat visibility, supports informed decision making, and contributes to a more secure digital environment.

items.name: infectious-disease-xai
items.description: summer 2026 project that develops an interpretable AI framework for predicting infectious disease spread, combining stochastic epidemiological modelling with explainable machine learning. focusing on diseases like tuberculosis, monkeypox, and COVID-19 variants, it aims to support transparent outbreak forecasting and early public health response.

items.name: A-Hybrid-Ensemble-Learning-Framework-For-Multi-Disease-Prediction-
items.description: An AI-powered diagnostic platform that utilizes an optimized machine learning framework and an asynchronous Flask backend to deliver real-time, zero-refresh predictive risk assessments for five critical health conditions.

items.description: Understanding of deep learning concepts such as Convolutional Neural Networks and Vision Transformer architectures. Knowledge of image preprocessing, feature extraction, and attention mechanisms for detecting manipulated media. Experience working with deepfake datasets and training/testing machine learning models.

items.description: A Bias-Aware and Explainable AI framework for automated resume screening using Machine Learning and NLP techniques. The system improves recruitment efficiency, reduces bias in candidate evaluation, and provides transparent prediction analysis using Explainable AI.

items.name: Feature-Importance-XAI-Project
items.description: This project provides a comprehensive framework for feature importance visualization and analysis in machine learning models. It implements multiple state-of-the-art methods for global interpretability including permutation importance, SHAP, SAGE, and stability analysis.

items.name: AI-Transparency-Tools
items.description: A comprehensive Explainable AI (XAI) toolkit focused on post-hoc global and local explanations for machine learning models. This project provides state-of-the-art interpretability methods with proper evaluation frameworks and interactive demonstrations.

items.name: Red-Teaming-for-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for adversarial robustness testing and red teaming of machine learning models. This project implements various adversarial attacks, robustness evaluation metrics, and visualization tools to assess the security and reliability of AI systems.

items.name: Decision-Tree-Extraction-from-Black-Box-Models
items.description: Comprehensive framework for extracting interpretable decision trees from black-box machine learning models. This project focuses on **post-hoc local/global interpretability** through **rule/tree extraction** methods.

items.name: Model-Behavioral-Testing-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive framework for model behavioral testing that evaluates machine learning models across various scenarios, edge cases, and adversarial conditions. This project focuses on trust and safety aspects of AI systems through systematic behavioral evaluation.

items.name: Bias-Detection-in-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for detecting and assessing bias in machine learning models, designed for research and educational purposes.

items.name: credit-portfolio-risk-optimization
items.description: An end-to-end analytics framework for retail credit decisioning that balances risk and profitability. It combines machine learning, financial metrics, and policy simulation to maximize expected portfolio value under risk constraints, reflecting real-world challenges faced by senior banking analytics teams.
